footer.tagline: Modern agricultural solutions for sustainable growth.

about.visionStatement: We are committed to building a strong legacy in agriculture by bringing innovative residue-free solutions that create trust, growth, and prosperity for every partner.

hero.subtitle: Building a Residue-Free Tomorrow
hero.title: Driving Residue-Free Agriculture in Maharashtra & Karnataka
hero.description: Synergy Crop Solutions is a trusted agri-input company dedicated to bio-based crop protection, farmer prosperity, and sustainable agriculture. We partner with distributors, dealers, and growers to deliver innovative solutions that leave no harmful residues.

overview.title: Company Overview
overview.subtitle: Who We Are
overview.body:
Synergy Crop Solutions is a regional agricultural input company focused on developing and distributing bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, and residue-free crop protection products. Founded with a vision to transform agriculture in Maharashtra and Karnataka, we bridge the gap between modern crop science and traditional farming wisdom.

Our team combines deep agronomic expertise with a passion for sustainable farming. We work closely with farmers, research institutions, and distribution networks to ensure that every product we bring to market is safe, effective, and environmentally responsible.

From smallholder farms to large agricultural enterprises, our solutions are designed to improve yields, reduce chemical dependency, and build long-term soil health.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To build a strong legacy in agriculture by bringing innovative residue-free solutions that create trust, growth, and prosperity for every partner.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To deliver new-generation crop protection products that are safe, effective, and residue-free, helping farmers improve harvests and helping distributors and dealers build lasting business.

items.description: Every product undergoes rigorous quality testing before reaching farmers.

items.description: Helping growers build healthier crops and sustainable agricultural growth.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Synergy Crop Solutions
whyChoose.subtitle: Built for the Challenges of Modern Agriculture

items.title: Japanese Lyophilization Technology
items.description: Industry-leading lyophilized microbial formulations ensure longer shelf life, higher microbial viability and superior field performance.

items.title: Scientifically Developed Products
items.description: Every formulation is developed using modern biotechnology and extensive agricultural research for consistent crop performance.

items.title: Strong Regional Network
items.description: Trusted distributor network across Maharashtra and Karnataka ensuring product availability and technical guidance.

items.title: Residue-Free Agriculture
items.description: Biological crop solutions that reduce chemical residues while improving soil and crop health.

items.title: Farmer-Centric Approach
items.description: Practical crop solutions backed by technical support and field assistance.

items.title: Proven Field Performance
items.description: Reliable performance demonstrated through successful field applications across Maharashtra and Karnataka.

technology.title: Our Technology
technology.subtitle: Powered by Science, Proven in the Field

lyophilization.title: Japanese Lyophilization Technology
lyophilization.description: Our flagship products are developed using advanced Japanese Lyophilization Technology — a freeze-drying process that preserves the viability and potency of beneficial microorganisms at room temperature, ensuring longer shelf life and field-level effectiveness without cold chain dependency.

nutrition.title: Imported Liquid Nutrition
nutrition.description: We import advanced liquid nutrition formulations designed for high-absorption foliar and soil application, delivering essential micronutrients in chelated forms that plants can absorb immediately.

bioSolutions.title: Bio-Based Crop Protection
bioSolutions.description: Our bio-pesticides and bio-fungicides harness naturally occurring microorganisms — including Trichoderma, Pseudomonas, and Bacillus thuringiensis — to provide effective, residue-free protection against diseases and pests.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Agriculture
sustainable.description: Every product we develop is rooted in sustainability — reducing chemical dependency, restoring soil health, and building long-term productivity for generations of farmers.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: Continuous research drives every formulation.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: Protecting both crops and nature.

items.title: Farmer First
items.description: Every solution begins with farmers' needs.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Reliable products through strict quality standards.

items.title: Scientific Excellence
items.description: Built on biotechnology, research and continuous improvement.

cta.description: Whether you are a farmer looking for effective crop protection, a distributor seeking reliable partners, or a dealer wanting to stock quality products — we are here to help.
